calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For An Order Setting Expert Disclosure Date Ccp Section 2034.250(A) And (B), Or In The Alternative Relief For Late Disclosure (Ccp Section 2034.720) And For An Order That Claimant Submit To A Medical Examination (Ccp Section 2024050)
Off Calendar Sep-24-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted on PETITIONER CSAA INSURANCE EXCHANGE's Motion For An Order Setting Expert Disclosure Date [CCP Section 2034.250(a) And (b)], Or In The Alternative Relief For Late Disclosure [CCP Section 2034.720] And For An Order That Claimant Submit To A Medical Examination [CCP Section 2024050], as follows:

This motion was specially set for hearing on shortened time on September 6, 2019. Opposition to the motion was required to be served on or before September 13, 2019. No opposition has been received by the court or posted in the Register of Actions. The motion is decided as unopposed. Petitioner's motion to serve its Expert Witness List is granted with Petitioner's Disclosure of Expert Witnesses dated August 28, 2019 deemed timely served. Respondent may serve a Supplemental Expert Witness List within ten days of service of a copy of this Order with Notice of Entry. Also granted is Petitioner's demand for a neurologic medical examination by Dr. Strassberg on October 7, 2019.

The prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
